title: Arihant Publications is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Arihant Publications is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Arihant Publications invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Kanpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Arihant Publications:
Arihant Publications is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arihant Publications!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
